name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents v13.1.0 — Two purely additive hardening features for foreground-assisted automation. (1) NOTIFICATION SURFACE: two new hooks (PreToolUse[AskUserQuestion] and Notification) fire OS-native macOS/Linux desktop banners via notify-desktop.sh whenever the plugin blocks on user input — Supervisor 4-option adjudication, rubric gate, Plan Reviewer NEEDS_HUMAN, Launch Pad Phase 6, /autonomous merge-and-continue. send-webhook.sh extended with a parallel `event=paused` payload on the same trigger, so operators receive Slack/Discord/PagerDuty pings in addition to the local banner. Both surfaces fire-and-forget; desktop notifications default-on (opt-out via AI_AGENT_MANAGER_DESKTOP_NOTIFICATIONS=0), webhook opt-in (AI_AGENT_MANAGER_WEBHOOK_URL). (2) LAUNCH_PAD_RESULT SCHEMA: new schema_version 1 result block emitted by Launch Pad Phase 7 (saved | discarded | blocked | aborted) with `saved_brief_path` field; /autonomous PLAN phase now reads this directly instead of relying on the v13.0.x ls-diff of .supervisor/jobs/pending/. Primary-path detection makes the v13.0.x concurrent-session ambiguity unlikely when LAUNCH_PAD_RESULT validates; the ls-diff fallback retains the original single-session-only constraint and the concurrent_session_detected abort, and remains the path used when the result block is absent or fails validation. v1 schema is exactly four fields (schema_version, status, saved_brief_path, summary) — discipline cap to prevent CODE_REVIEW_RESULT v3-style validation bloat. Builds on v13.0.0's /autonomous orchestration semantics (chains /launch-pad → /supervisor, opt-in multi-iteration mode --allow-multi-iteration re-plans on two SUPERVISOR_RESULT signals: rubric_score N<M with user-merge confirmation; failed + inter_subtask_gap). v13.1 is purely additive on top of v13.0.1: no agent removed, no existing schema changed, no behavioral change to any existing hook/script/skill/command. New artifacts: notify-desktop.sh, three hook entries (PreToolUse[AskUserQuestion], Notification, SubagentStop[launch-pad-runner]), send-webhook.sh paused-event branch, LAUNCH_PAD_RESULT entry in RESULT_SCHEMAS.md, Phase 7 emission in agents/launch-pad.md. Preserves all v13.0.0 / v12.2.0 / v12.1.0 / v12.0.0 / prior layers. 13 agent roles, 50 reusable skills, 19 quality gate hooks, 12 slash commands, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
